title: Share an automation from one board to another
excerpt: Can I access the automations created on one board and share them, or pull them into the automations on another board?  I am creating a few different boards, but would like to use the 23 automations I already created and …

posts.author: ranthony (Robyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I access the automations created on one board and share them, or pull them into the automations on another board? I am creating a few different boards, but would like to use the 23 automations I already created and also have them be used on my second board without rewriting them.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ranthony! You are able to save an automation recipe as a template to use across boards.

Let me know if this is what you’re looking for
